name: Local SD / FLUX (ComfyUI)
description: Generate images locally through a running ComfyUI server. Ships with curated workflow presets for Stable Diffusion 1.5, SDXL and FLUX, plus a lightweight provider-ranker that picks between local-GPU / local-CPU / remote ComfyUI based on VRAM, queue depth and reliability.

description_i18n.zh: 通过本地 ComfyUI 服务出图。内置 Stable Diffusion 1.5 / SDXL / FLUX 三套校准过的工作流预设，并集成一个简化的 provider 排序器，按 VRAM / 队列深度 / 可靠性自动在 本地 GPU / 本地 CPU / 远端 ComfyUI 间挑选。
description_i18n.en: Generate images locally through a running ComfyUI server. Ships with curated workflow presets for Stable Diffusion 1.5, SDXL and FLUX, plus a lightweight provider-ranker that picks between local-GPU / local-CPU / remote ComfyUI based on VRAM, queue depth and reliability.

author: OpenAkita
